issue_summary: record per-segment deletion count in segments file; add maxDoc() & numDocs() in IW; deprecate docCount() in favor of maxDoc()
javadoc_before: /** Returns the number of documents currently in this index. */
javadoc_after:
/** Returns the number of documents currently in this
   *  index, not counting deletions.
   * @deprecated Please use {@link #maxDoc()} (same as this
   * method) or {@link #numDocs()} (also takes deletions
   * into account), instead. */
